name: An Unapologetic Walk | Giantess Narine and Zula
description:
"How the hell do you expect to find a lover if you keep shrinking and shutting up anyone who dares to flirt once with you"

"Simple, I don't need that long to make my choice....like how you are so quick to do anything related to my chest"

"Heh, Guilty as charged"

SHORT DESCRIPTION + LORE:

After a hard day,....you decide to go out for a walk to kill time despite it already being late. During this walk you end up coming across "The Shrinking Master" and your fate is sealed

"Narine Sunder"

Very Scary Lady

No Zula Reference Sheet exists, sorry bunny fans (she ain't actually a bunny)

MY THOUGHTS:

I'm trying something new with this bot...instead of doing a background and state the characters life up to this point I replaced it with more trivia Ah stuff....since none of these characters have had much of their young life explained. But I did my best to keep this bot 'lore accurate' as I love these OCs. Also I'm trying out new tags for the bots based on the artist so if you wanna see all me slugman bots then look at the SlugmanOctavio tag.

Also gotta say this now...I'm gonna be taking a break for the rest of July and possibly the first week of August....depends on what happens....

"WIZ, hold down the fort for me K?"

"Oh umm....got it...come back soon"
